phrases.en: Pam pours some cereal from the box into her bowl.
phrases.zh: 帕姆从盒子里倒一些麦片到碗里。

phrases.en: And sprinkles some sugar on her cereal.
And puts the slices on her cereal.
phrases.zh: 再把香蕉片放到麦片上。

phrases.en: Dan puts two slices of bread into the toaster.
phrases.zh: 丹把两片面包放进烤面包机里。

phrases.en: By pressing the starter, he lowers the bread into the toaster.
phrases.zh: 他按下启动键，把面包降进烤面包机里。

phrases.en: Hot wires inside the toaster toast the bread.
phrases.zh: 烤面包机里的热丝把面包烤好。

phrases.en: The toast pops up when it's done.
Dan spreads some butter and jam on his toast.
phrases.zh: 丹在吐司上抹一些黄油和果酱。
